excerpt: Renterra automatically generates ledger entries for every invoice, payment, and fee—so your books stay clean without the extra work. Nightly sync with QuickBooks online to make bookkeeping hands-free.
With seamless ERP integrations into systems like CMiC, SAP, Oracle, and Sage, RentalResult ensures your data flows effortlessly between platforms, reducing manual tasks and improving accuracy.

Yes. Renterra allows you to batch send invoices or receipts to customers with full flexibility. Renterra also supports automatically sending monthly statements to customers on a schedule of your choosing.

The embedded model flips this. Rather than being a separate step, payment is woven into the rental workflow. A customer books online, picks up in-store, drops off elsewhere, and when surcharges hit for fuel or damage, the system captures payment automatically based on the terms they already agreed to. No phone calls. No chasing. No friction.
